$description: Global Soccer Academy (GSA) program tokens. CONFIRMED by Luisa León (GSC Brand & Communications). Palette #191919 / #E7290F / #F07D04 / #FFFFFF; fonts Morganite (primary) + Montserrat (secondary). Source: Slack #soulmd, Open Knowledge Pack GSA. Inherits corporate GSC base tokens (spacing, radius, motion, type ramp). Do not edit without Luisa León approval.

ink.$description: Primary — GSA base ink, surfaces and dark backgrounds

red.$description: Primary accent — GSA signature red, CTAs and highlights

orange.$description: Secondary accent — GSA orange, energy and motion

display.$description: Primary — Morganite (Google Fonts, included in assets/fonts). Tall condensed display.

ui.$description: Secondary — Montserrat (Google Fonts). Labels, eyebrows, buttons.
